codeReview.summary: The admin-usuarios-redesign feature implements a refined UI for the staff management page. All 6 files were updated with visual refinements: StaffCard (compact layout, better avatar styling), StaffDetailPanel (cleaner sections with uppercase labels), CapacityIndicator (semantic color function, smaller progress bar), AddStaffModal/ReassignModal (consistent radius and spacing), and UsuariosPage (refined callout card). The changes are purely cosmetic/styling - no behavioral changes to API calls, form validation, or modal functionality. The unused adminUi import was removed from StaffCard (a valid cleanup). All expected behavior requirements from the feature are preserved.

summary: Feature passes scrutiny. The worker followed the impeccable-admin-worker skill procedure correctly, reading .impeccable.md and the existing admin-ui design tokens before implementing. Visual refinements are consistent with the Notion/Linear-inspired design direction specified in mission AGENTS.md. All functionality (create, toggle, remove, reassign) remains intact. Biome check passes on modified files. TypeScript compiles without errors. The unused import removal in StaffCard.tsx was a valid cleanup since adminUi was not used in that file (only in StaffDetailPanel which still uses it).
